final_assessment.summary: The protocol behavior specification document successfully captures the OIG cloud protocol behavior with comprehensive state machines, timing analysis, and message format documentation. However, the creation of mock server implementation code in the testing/ directory violates the explicit 'Must NOT Have' guardrails specified in the plan.
strengths: Detailed state machine with Mermaid diagrams
Accurate timing statistics from real data
Clear implementation guidelines without actual code
violations: Mock server implementation code created (testing/mock_cloud_server.py and related files)
Test infrastructure implementation (13 Python files in testing/)
final_assessment.verdict: PARTIAL_COMPLIANCE - Documentation objectives met, but implementation guardrails violated
